---
title: "Brain Injury Case Management"
description: "Brain injury case management and rehabilitation coordination across Northern Ireland."
---

# Brain Injury Case Management

We support individuals and families following acquired or traumatic brain injury.

## Support May Include

- Rehabilitation coordination
- Cognitive support planning
- Community reintegration
- Therapy liaison
- Family support
- Equipment and care coordination

::: {.highlight-box}
Brain injury support should be practical, consistent, and shaped around real life.
:::

[Make an Enquiry](../contact.qmd){.button-link}
